name: Gig Work
overview: GIG WORK is an adult animated action/adventure TV show. Set in a dark and dystopian world, a group of friends struggle to make ends meet while battling their own inner demons. The show explores themes of friendship, survival, and the quest for meaning in a society teetering on the brink of collapse. It is a reflection of the experiences of Gen Z and millennials during the isolation of COVID-19 and the struggles of working in the gig economy.
